title: cool train backround
description: replacing the default Minecraft main menu background with a train from TeamCis
body:
just a simple pack to swap out the boring vanilla panorama for a train photo. makes the main menu look way cleaner.

### what’s inside

-   **new look:** custom train background for the start screen.
    
-   **performance:** it’s just a texture swap, so no lag or fps drops.
    
-   **vibe:** perfect if you're part of the community and want a better view when you boot up the game.
